session.user:
Run the following commands and report results: 1. prettier --check docs/learned/architecture/json-dataclass-utilities.md 2. make check-docs (if available) or just report that only a markdown file was changed so no Python linting needed.
Only report results - do not fix anything.
session.assistant: I'll run these commands and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Check if make check-docs target exists

session.tool_result: Checking formatting... All matched files use Prettier code style!
make: *** No rule to make target 'check-docs'. Stop. Target not available
session.assistant:
## Results
**prettier** passed: Markdown file uses Prettier code style. File: `docs/learned/architecture/json-dataclass-utilities.md`
**make check-docs** not available: The `check-docs` target does not exist in the Makefile. Only a markdown documentation file was changed, so no Python linting is needed.
